The '''Colu system''', also known as the '''Clak'dor system''',<ref name="MF">[[Millennium Falcon (novel)|''Millennium Falcon'']]</ref> and as the '''Mayagil system''',<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|296|Mayagil sector}}</ref> was the home [[Star system/Legends|system]] of [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]].

{{System-stub}}
